top.title: 'Ebola has tortured us': Fear grips eastern DR Congo as deadly virus spreads
top.summary: The health minister has acknowledged that medics are playing catch-up with the virus after being slow to detect it.

top.title: Ebola outbreak may be spreading faster than first thought, WHO doctor warns
top.summary: Hundreds of cases are suspected in central Africa but experts fear the actual number may be much higher.

top.title: Key people smuggler arrested after BBC uncovered identity
top.summary: The 28-year-old's network is thought to have transported thousands of illegal migrants into the UK.

top.title: Google to release first smart glasses since Google Glass flop
top.summary: The glasses will go on sale sometime in autumn and allow Google's artificial intelligence product to interact with a user.

top.title: Zoe Kleinman: Why the AI industry is the real winner of the Musk-Altman trial
top.summary: The trial in Oakland, California has helped lift the veil on the AI sector - and the huge egos of the men at the heart of it.

top.title: Elon Musk has lost yet another legal battle. Why he'll still keep fighting
top.summary: Musk has lost his high-profile lawsuit against OpenAI, but is not likely to change his aggressive style.
